insights: The market shows a clear upward trend, with the current total (1005) consistently outperforming both the 7-day and 30-day averages, signaling sustained momentum.
FAANG+ companies are showing increased hiring volatility but a net positive trend, suggesting a stabilization of headcount growth after recent industry-wide corrections.
The stability in unicorn hiring combined with the steady growth in the 'other' tier indicates a broadening of the job market beyond just top-tier tech firms.
